headline: PGIM Expands Active ETF Lineup with Launch of PGIM Jennison US Core Equity ETF
summary: NEWARK, N.J., May 21, 2026--The ETF is comprised of a roughly 100-stock core portfolio and its strategy is informed by Jennison’s fundamental, bottom up investment approach.
